Timeline Summary:
* We have 5 VSIs(3 Internal/2 External(IKS account)) failing to go in RUNNING state due to Waiting for vdisk .
CORE team performed STOP/START for the VSIs but still seeing same issue once we try to start the VSI.
CORE team performed STOP/START for the VSIs but still seeing same issue once we try to start the VSI.
We have storage-sre and CSRE team checking and while checking logs we found error Volume encryption key state is not active on volume So team is checking if they can find more details from logs.
from icl we found Volume encryption key state is not active on volume 
Rodney joined and suggested to check with customer to ask them to restore their service to service group and then restart VSI
Case CS4424900 has been created for IKS customer.
